title: Rāmsar Cold Snap
lead: A cold snap is affecting Rāmsar with unusual temperatures. The Z-Score of -1.50 indicates a significant deviation from the norm.
body:
The current cold snap in Rāmsar is characterized by a Score of 5.0/10 and a Level of UNUSUAL. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 3.0 GG, while the Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 60% with no wind, as indicated by the Vento at 0.0 km/h.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely for further updates and potential changes in the weather pattern.
